title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 9–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Kaido, Momonosuke, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #8, Imu as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
